title: What Should An AI Device Look Like? — With Alex Himel
summary: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, discusses how AI glasses could become the next major computing platform. The conversation covers AI assistants for daily tasks, competition from OpenAI, Google, Apple and Amazon, privacy concerns around facial recognition, and the role of on-device AI in wearable devices.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, on the case for AI glasses as the next major computing platform. The discussion covers AI assistants for daily tasks, on-device AI in wearables, and competition from OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon. It also addresses privacy concerns tied to facial recognition in face-worn devices, a question that shapes how such hardware can ship.
